Headline: #52 Kedzie Temporary Reroute near Kedzie/Jackson
ShortDescription: 52 Kedzie buses rrtd SB via Kedzie, Madison, Homan, Harrison & Kedzie; NB via Kedzie, Congress, Homan, Madison & Kedzie due to street blockage nr Kedzie/Jackson

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#52 Kedzie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions.

Southbound buses will operate via Kedzie, Madison, Homan, Harrison, then resume their normal route on Kedzie.

Northbound buses will operate via Kedzie, Congress, Homan, Madison, then resume their normal route on Kedzie.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Kedzie/Jackson.
